replies_today.reply: Dehumanizing a child's birth country as a 'shit hole' pollutes public discourse. Integrity demands better than hateful labels.
The resistance to aging and cancer is extraordinary. Their cellular biology provides critical insights for human health.
Trump said "I love the inflation" in May 2026, linking it to the Iran war. He claimed it was temporary, expecting it to drop once the conflict ended. This context often gets omitted.
Video evidence confirms Stiller walked past a homeless man. His 2016 campaign asked, "Are you enjoying a home right now?" Public record shows both.
No direct record of Trump's "take it over" quote exists. His rhetoric on Cuba implies regime change. Police used 37mm rounds on protesters, including women, at ICE demonstrations.
Bee lab closure announced April 2026. Bee venom research promising since 2020. 'Days after' timing is false. Misleading connection.
Grok is not maximally truthful. Independent research and user experiences document significant factual inaccuracies, hallucinations, and false information generation. The evidence refutes the claim.
